languages.text: {n}Годы спячки не прошли даром для машинных духов: экран краснеет от обилия ошибок. Длинный список записей, оставленных владельцем, поврежден почти полностью. Если вам повезет, из уцелевших обрывков получится выудить полезную информацию.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Годы спячки не прошли даром для машинных духов: экран краснеет от обилия ошибок. Длинный список записей, оставленных владельцем, поврежден почти полностью. Если вам повезет, из уцелевших обрывков получится выудить полезную информацию.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Years of hibernation have taken their toll on the machine spirits and a flood of errors turns the screen red. The long list of journal entries left by the owner is all but completely corrupted. With luck, you might piece together useful information from the surviving fragments.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Годы спячки не прошли даром для машинных духов: экран краснеет от обилия ошибок. Длинный список записей, оставленных владельцем, поврежден почти полностью. Если вам повезет, из уцелевших обрывков получится выудить полезную информацию.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Years of slumber have left their mark on the machine spirits, and a flood of errors turns the screen red. The long list of journal entries left by the owner is all but completely damaged. If you are lucky, you might piece together useful information from the surviving scraps.{/n}

{n}Years of slumber have left their mark on the machine spirits, and a flood of errors turns the screen red. The long list of journal entries left by the owner is all but completely damaged. If you are lucky, you might piece together useful information from the surviving scraps.{/n}

{n}Years of hibernation have taken their toll on the machine spirits and a flood of errors turns the screen red. The long list of journal entries left by the owner is all but completely corrupted. With luck, you might piece together useful information from the surviving fragments.{/n}

{n}Years of hibernation have taken their toll on the machine spirits and a flood of errors turns the screen red. The long list of journal entries left by the owner is all but completely corrupted. With luck, you might piece together useful information from the surviving fragments.{/n}

languages.text: {n}长年的休眠已经严重损害了机魂，无数报错信息将屏幕染成红色。原主人留下的一长串日志几乎都已损毁殆尽。运气好的话，你说不定还能从残存的碎片里拼凑出有用的信息。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Years of hibernation have taken their toll on the machine spirits and a flood of errors turns the screen red. The long list of journal entries left by the owner is all but completely corrupted. With luck, you might piece together useful information from the surviving fragments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}长年的休眠已经严重损害了机魂，无数报错信息将屏幕染成红色。原主人留下的一长串日志几乎都已损毁殆尽。运气好的话，你说不定还能从残存的碎片里拼凑出有用的信息。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los años de hibernación no han pasado en balde para los espíritus máquina y un torrente de errores vuelve roja la pantalla. La larga lista de entradas en el diario del dueño está corrompida casi en su totalidad. Con suerte, puede que descubras algo útil a partir de los fragmentos que han sobrevivido.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Years of hibernation have taken their toll on the machine spirits and a flood of errors turns the screen red. The long list of journal entries left by the owner is all but completely corrupted. With luck, you might piece together useful information from the surviving fragments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los años de hibernación no han pasado en balde para los espíritus máquina y un torrente de errores vuelve roja la pantalla. La larga lista de entradas en el diario del dueño está corrompida casi en su totalidad. Con suerte, puede que descubras algo útil a partir de los fragmentos que han sobrevivido.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les années d'hibernation ont affecté les esprits de la machine, et les messages d'erreur inscrits en rouge commencent à recouvrir l'écran. La longue liste d'entrées de journal laissées par le propriétaire s'avère totalement corrompue. Avec un peu de chance, vous trouverez tout de même quelque chose d'utile parmi les fragments intacts.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Years of hibernation have taken their toll on the machine spirits and a flood of errors turns the screen red. The long list of journal entries left by the owner is all but completely corrupted. With luck, you might piece together useful information from the surviving fragments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les années d'hibernation ont affecté les esprits de la machine, et les messages d'erreur inscrits en rouge commencent à recouvrir l'écran. La longue liste d'entrées de journal laissées par le propriétaire s'avère totalement corrompue. Avec un peu de chance, vous trouverez tout de même quelque chose d'utile parmi les fragments intacts.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yıllar süren kış uykusu, makine ruhlarına zarar vermiş. Bir hata akışı, ekranı kırmızıya çeviriyor. Sahibi tarafından bırakılan çok sayıda kaydın neredeyse tamamı bozulmuş durumda. Şanslıysan sağlam kalan parçalardan yararlı bilgileri toplayabilirsin.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Years of hibernation have taken their toll on the machine spirits and a flood of errors turns the screen red. The long list of journal entries left by the owner is all but completely corrupted. With luck, you might piece together useful information from the surviving fragments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yıllar süren kış uykusu, makine ruhlarına zarar vermiş. Bir hata akışı, ekranı kırmızıya çeviriyor. Sahibi tarafından bırakılan çok sayıda kaydın neredeyse tamamı bozulmuş durumda. Şanslıysan sağlam kalan parçalardan yararlı bilgileri toplayabilirsin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der jahrelange Ruhezustand hat die Maschinengeister stark belastet und die Flut an Fehlern färbt den Bildschirm rot. Die lange Liste der Tagebucheinträge des Besitzers ist stark beschädigt. Mit Glück kannst du aus den erhaltenen Fragmenten nützliche Informationen zusammensetzen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Years of hibernation have taken their toll on the machine spirits and a flood of errors turns the screen red. The long list of journal entries left by the owner is all but completely corrupted. With luck, you might piece together useful information from the surviving fragments.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der jahrelange Ruhezustand hat die Maschinengeister stark belastet und die Flut an Fehlern färbt den Bildschirm rot. Die lange Liste der Tagebucheinträge des Besitzers ist stark beschädigt. Mit Glück kannst du aus den erhaltenen Fragmenten nützliche Informationen zusammensetzen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}長年の休眠が機械精霊に打撃を与えており、エラーの奔流が画面を赤に染める。所有者が遺した長大な日誌記録の一覧は、ほぼ完全に破損している。運がよければ、生き残った断片から、有用な情報を継ぎ合わせられるかもしれない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Years of hibernation have taken their toll on the machine spirits and a flood of errors turns the screen red. The long list of journal entries left by the owner is all but completely corrupted. With luck, you might piece together useful information from the surviving fragments.{/n}
